name: Uso de Herramientas Sysinternals Detectado
description: Se ha detectado el uso de herramientas Sysinternals, lo cual puede ser un indicador de actividad maliciosa o de reconocimiento. Estas herramientas son a menudo utilizadas por adversarios para evasión de defensas y recolección de información.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (1 or 13) that triggered the alert.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process image (executable path) if EventID is 1.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the process if EventID is 1.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The registry key/value path if EventID is 13.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The value set for the registry key if EventID is 13.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account associated with the event.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: rule_name
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that generated the event, if available.
